Trigger Criteria: Regulation is currently in effect (as of Q1 2026). Non-compliance results in an immediate legal inability to sell or move product.
Regulation has a hard deadline within the next 6 months (e.g., Oct 2026). Requires immediate structural or labeling changes.
No immediate ban, but mandates complex historical data collection or new recurring reporting (e.g., EPA TSCA reporting).
Minor adjustments to existing standards (like VOC limits) that affect specific SKU subsets or regions rather than entire lines.
Office locations or facilities producing non-regulated "articles" with no chemical or hazard disclosure requirements.
